core_principles: Authenticity over polish: use raw textures, wood, and earthy tones to evoke the feeling of a rustic Texas BBQ.
Food is the Hero: Keep UI elements minimalist so the high-quality food photography stands out.
Tactile interfaces: Buttons and cards should feel grounded, using subtle inner shadows or borders instead of generic drop shadows.

grid_strategies.specialties: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 with irregular spanning for the 5 items (e.g. first two take 1.5 cols each on large, next three take 1 col)
grid_strategies.about: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12, text spans 7, image spans 5

buttons.primary: bg-brand-primary text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-brand-primary_hover transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-text-primary border border-text-primary rounded-none px-8 py-4 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-text-primary hover:text-white transition-colors

cards.style: bg-surfaces-card border border-surfaces-card_border rounded-sm p-6 sm:p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

forms.inputs: bg-surfaces-input_bg border-b border-surfaces-input_border rounded-none px-0 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-primary focus:ring-0 text-text-primary placeholder:text-text-muted transition-colors

navigation.style: fixed w-full z-50 bg-background-primary/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-surfaces-card_border py-4 px-6 sm:px-8 flex justify-between items-center

about_image.alt: Chef Ali cooking on a charcoal grill

interactive_elements.booking_form: Shadcn UI Calendar + Form components. Customized to remove the 'tech/SaaS' look. Use square corners, earthy borders, and warm active states.
interactive_elements.testimonials: Use react-fast-marquee for an 'Editorial Ribbon' of quotes. Slow, smooth, elegant serif text on a subtle secondary background.
interactive_elements.animations: Framer Motion for gentle fade-up on scroll. No aggressive scaling or bouncing. Transitions should feel organic and relaxed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, react-fast-marquee, lucide-react (if not present), and configure google fonts for 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Work Sans', and 'Caveat'.
Implement a smooth scrolling single-page layout (use Lenis if possible, otherwise native CSS smooth scroll).
For the Specialties section, build an asymmetric image grid using the provided specialty images. Ensure images are high-quality and object-cover.
For the Sample Menus section, use typography-led design (like a physical restaurant menu) rather than typical web cards.
In the Booking/Contact section, integrate Shadcn's Calendar and Form components. Strip their default border-radius to match the rustic/raw aesthetic (use rounded-none or rounded-sm).
Include the Instagram link as a prominent social CTA in the footer and nav.
